welcome.title: Welcome to GoAutos!
welcome.subtitle: Let's set up your dealership step by step

addVehicle.title: Add your first vehicle
addVehicle.subtitle: Step 1 of 2
addVehicle.description: Start your inventory by adding your first vehicle. This will help you get familiar with the platform and you can start managing your stock immediately.
addVehicle.motivation: 💡 Tip: Don't worry if you don't have all the data now, you can edit it later.

createWebsite.title: Excellent! Vehicle added
createWebsite.subtitle: Step 2 of 2
createWebsite.description: Design your personalized website to showcase your vehicles to your customers. The builder is very easy to use and you can customize it with your brand colors.
createWebsite.motivation: 🎨 You already have your brand values configured, the site will be created with your colors.

complete.title: All set! 🎉
complete.subtitle: You've completed the initial setup
complete.description: You can now start managing your dealership with GoAutos. You have access to all platform features.
